svg.title: Personal Finance Assistant — Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: System architecture showing React frontend, FastAPI backend, query router dispatching to four handlers, storage layer, cross-cutting middleware, and external services.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the React frontend layer')
g.text: Chat · Transactions · Budgets · Receipt upload · Memory

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the FastAPI backend')
sendPrompt('How does the query router work?')
g.text: Keyword classifier → escalates to cheap LLM only when uncertain · SQL · RAG · Agent · Vision · Memory inject

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the SQL handler work?')
sendPrompt('How does the RAG handler work?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent handler work?')
sendPrompt('How does the vision handler work?')
sendPrompt('What data is stored in PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How is pgvector used for embeddings?')

g.text: Loaded per-request · injected as system-prompt prefix · feature #10 memory

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the LLM provider configured?')
sendPrompt('How does the web search tool work?')

svg.text: Stack: FastAPI · SQLModel · asyncpg · pgvector · Alembic · httpx · Vite + React · Tailwind
Auth: python-jose (JWT) · passlib · no Django · no Celery · offline mock fallback
